feed.title: RED RD XPLR MAX 46T (RD-RED-1E-E1) — firmware
feed.subtitle: Production firmware releases for SRAM RD-RED-1E-E1.

entry.title: RED RD XPLR MAX 46T (RD-RED-1E-E1) — firmware 2.54.9
entry.summary:
RED RD XPLR MAX 46T RD-RED-1E-E1 — firmware 2.54.9

Part: RED24 1x RD

Please ensure your AXS App is on the latest version before installing this Device Firmware Update. - Minor Bugfix and reliability improvement.

Released: 2026-03-04

entry.title: RED RD XPLR MAX 46T (RD-RED-1E-E1) — firmware 2.54.6
entry.summary:
RED RD XPLR MAX 46T RD-RED-1E-E1 — firmware 2.54.6

Part: RED24 1x RD

Please ensure your AXS App and Karoo Bike Computer are on the latest version before installing this Device Firmware Update. - This firmware supports SRAM's next generation Bluetooth protocol, SB2, which improves BLE communication between AXS components, the AXS App, and Karoo bike computers. All older generation AXS components, SB1, are also supported.

Released: 2025-12-15

entry.title: RED RD XPLR MAX 46T (RD-RED-1E-E1) — firmware 2.53.8
entry.summary:
RED RD XPLR MAX 46T RD-RED-1E-E1 — firmware 2.53.8

Part: RED24 1x RD

This firmware update contains platform updates.

Released: 2025-09-19

entry.title: RED RD XPLR MAX 46T (RD-RED-1E-E1) — firmware 2.53.1
entry.summary:
RED RD XPLR MAX 46T RD-RED-1E-E1 — firmware 2.53.1

Part: RED24 1x RD

Please ensure your AXS App is on the latest version from the app store to activate the following improvements. This firmware update contains minor bug fixes, platform updates, future product support, and reliability improvements.

Released: 2025-09-17

entry.title: RED RD XPLR MAX 46T (RD-RED-1E-E1) — firmware 2.49.1
entry.summary:
RED RD XPLR MAX 46T RD-RED-1E-E1 — firmware 2.49.1

Part: RED24 1x RD

* Minor Bug Fixes, Platform updates and reliability improvements * Default shift assignment added for wireless blips

Released: 2024-05-29
